data.body: R6 (5dac) PLAN PASSED round-6 (5->2->1->4->1->PASS; extra rounds from my own grounding slips the gate caught: wrong step name, over-claimed block_threshold invariant). CLAIMED 5dac assignee cal6982-agent (attestation head_sha=43d15452=HEAD, valid). IMPLEMENTED: passes.py triage_advisories(surviving)+APPLY_NOW_MARGIN=0.10 (pure, deterministic, filters decision==advisory, priority vs block_threshold w/ DEFAULT fallback, sort -priority/criteria[0]/id); workflow_ops.py plan_review_coach sets verdict['triage'] (schema additionalProperties:true, no schema change); tests/unit/test_plan_review_triage.py (6 tests: determinism/boundary/ordering/advisory_only/det-tier/integration, all pass); docs/plan-review-gate.md 'Advisory triage' section. Pre-flight: make lint GREEN, make typecheck GREEN, touched-area tests GREEN (145); full make test running. Next: commit as bot + push gerrit refs/for/main + Verified+1 before close. R7 (b1a4) round-6 review running.
